Describe the key visual events occurring during the shaving demonstration from start to finish.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a title card displays 'Shaving' and 'High Speed Video Microscope Footage'; at 4s, a man with a thick beard holds an electric shaver with exposed blades; at 8s, the shaver head presses against the chin with a 'Philips' label visible; at 10s, hair clippings cover the shaver head labeled 'BRAUN'; at 14s, the person holds the shaver against their beard again.
